items.title: Person 5912 (Mary Jane Stevenson (Drummenny Middle)) linked to 2 Records from same census source: Census 1911
items.detail: Person 5912 (Mary Jane Stevenson (Drummenny Middle)) is linked to 2 distinct Records (record_ids: 316, 317) from the same census source 'Census 1911' (source_id=4). Each Record represents a separate census household return. A single Person should not appear in multiple households in the same census; this is a probable merge error (GC07). Review the linked RecordedPersons to determine whether these are the same individual or two distinct people who have been incorrectly merged.
items.recommended_action: Review and split Person if Records represent distinct individuals.

items.title: Relationship 4897: parent 5979 (Jane Graham (Drumcroagh)) / child 5980 (John Graham (Drumcroagh)) — age gap implausible
items.detail: Relationship 4897 (parent_child): parent Person 5979 (Jane Graham (Drumcroagh), gender=female) birth year ~1857; child Person 5980 (John Graham (Drumcroagh)) birth year ~1868; gap = 11 yrs. Violation(s): gap of 11 yrs is below minimum of 15 yrs (parent birth ~1857, child birth ~1868). Tolerance applied: ±2 yrs on each estimated year. GC12 — probable merge error if violation is not explained by census age imprecision.
items.recommended_action: Verify birth year estimates. If confirmed implausible, review the underlying RecordedRelationships for a mis-assigned relationship.
